data.body:
Poisonings in Reptiles (Fitzgerald & Newquist 2008) mentions cases of rhododendron and oak poisoning in tortoises, and other plants (azaleas, laurel, yew, lilies, holly, ivy &c) poisonous to reptiles in general. 
No mention of ragwort, or any other source of Pyrrolizidine alkaloids (PAs).
